title: Ombudsmen Act 1975 — New Zealand Legislation
description: New Zealand's statutory framework establishing the office of Ombudsman, defining their investigative powers, complaint procedures, and oversight responsibilities for public service agencies, state enterprises, and local authorities. This legislation enables independent investigation of administrative decisions and establishes accountability mechanisms for government operations.
